lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਲਹੁ ਭੁਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh moolahu bhulaaeian vich lab lobh ahankaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs have been led astray from the very beginning; within them lurks greed, avarice and ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਧਿ ਮਤਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਹਿਰਿ ਲਈ ਬੋਲਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sudh mat karatai hir lee bolan sabh vikaar |
lines.english: The Creator has taken away their subtle intellect, and all their speech is corrupt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਗੜਾ ਕਰਦਿਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਦਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰੈ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jhagarraa karadiaa anadin gudarai sabad na karai veechaar |
lines.english: Their nights and days pass in argument, and they do not reflect upon the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਤੈ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਅਨਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਗੵਾਨੁ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ditai kitai na santokheean antar trisanaa bahut agayaan andhaar |
lines.english: No matter what they are given, they are not satisfied; within them is desire, and the great darkness of ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨਾਲਹੁ ਤੁਟੀਆ ਭਲੀ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukhaa naalahu tutteea bhalee jinaa maaeaa mohi piaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is right to break with the self-willed manmukhs; to them, the love of Maya is sweet. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਭਉ ਸੰਸਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tina bhau sansaa kiaa kare jin satigur sir karataar |
lines.english: What can fear and doubt do to those, who have given their heads to the Creator, and to the True Guru?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhur tin kee paij rakhadaa aape rakhanahaar |
lines.english: He who has preserved honor from the beginning of time, He shall preserve their honor as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mil preetam sukh paaeaa sachai sabad veechaar |
lines.english: Meeting their Beloved, they find peace; they reflect upon the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਆਪੇ ਪਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sukhadaataa seviaa aape parakhanahaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I serve the Giver of Peace; He Himself is the Assessor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਸਭਨਾ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh teriaa too sabhanaa raas |
lines.english: All beings are Yours; You are the wealth of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਦੇਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਰੀਕੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too dehi tis sabh kichh milai koee hor sareek naahee tudh paas |
lines.english: One unto whom You give, obtains everything; there is no one else to rival You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਇਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭਸ ਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: too iko daataa sabhas daa har peh aradaas |
lines.english: You alone are the Great Giver of all; I offer my prayer unto You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਤੂ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis dee tudh bhaavai tis dee too man laihi so jan saabaas |
lines.english: One with whom You are pleased, is accepted by You; how blessed is such a person!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਚੋਜੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh teraa choj varatadaa dukh sukh tudh paas |2|
lines.english: Your wondrous play is pervading everywhere. I place my pain and pleasure before You. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੈ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sachai bhaavade dar sachai sachiaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are pleasing to the True Lord; they are judged to be true in the True Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਮਨਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: saajan man aanand hai gur kaa sabad veechaar |
lines.english: The minds of such friends are filled with bliss, as they reflect upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸਾਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: antar sabad vasaaeaa dukh kattiaa chaanan keea karataar |
lines.english: They enshrine the Shabad within their hearts; their pain is dispelled, and the Creator blesses them with the Divine Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਖਣਹਾਰਾ ਰਖਸੀ ਆਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak rakhanahaaraa rakhasee aapanee kirapaa dhaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Savior Lord shall save them, and shower them with His Mercy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਸੇਵੈ ਤੇਹੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੇ ਚਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa sevai teho hovai je chalai tisai rajaae |
lines.english: As you serve Him, you will become like Him, as you walk according to His Will.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਭੈ ਰਚਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sevaa chaakaree bhai rach kaar kamaae |
lines.english: Serve the Guru, and wait upon Him; as you work, maintain the Fear of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਤੂਹੈ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: teree vaddiaaee toohai jaanadaa tudh jevadd avar na koee |
lines.english: You alone know Your greatness - no one else is as great as You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜੀ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kichh aap hai avar na doojee jaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, He Himself is everything; there is no other place to go. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਸਰੀਕੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd hor sareek hovai taa aakheeai tudh jevadd toohai hoee |
lines.english: If there were some other rival as great as You, then I would speak of him. You alone are as great as You are.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹੋਰੁ ਤਿਸ ਦੀ ਰੀਸ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin too seviaa tin sukh paaeaa hor tis dee rees kare kiaa koee |
lines.english: One who serves You obtains peace; who else can compare to You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਭੰਨਣ ਘੜਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਹਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਅਗੈ ਮੰਗਣ ਨੋ ਹਥ ਜੋੜਿ ਖਲੀ ਸਭ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: too bhanan gharran samarath daataar heh tudh agai mangan no hath jorr khalee sabh hoee |
lines.english: You are all-powerful to destroy and create, O Great Giver; with palms pressed together, all stand begging before You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਮੈ ਕੋਈ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਭਸੈ ਨੋ ਦਾਨੁ ਦਿਤਾ ਖੰਡੀ ਵਰਭੰਡੀ ਪਾਤਾਲੀ ਪੁਰਈ ਸਭ ਲੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd daataar mai koee nadar na aavee tudh sabhasai no daan ditaa khanddee varabhanddee paataalee puree sabh loee |3|
lines.english: I see none as great as You, O Great Giver; You give in charity to the beings of all the continents, worlds, solar systems, nether regions and universes. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਈਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man parateet na aaeea sehaj na lago bhaau |
lines.english: O mind, you have no faith, and you have not embraced love for the Celestial Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਇਆ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aaeaa so paravaan hai ji guramukh sach samaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, his coming alone is approved, who, as Gurmukh, merges into the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai saad na paaeo manahatth kiaa gun gaae |
lines.english: you do not enjoy the sublime taste of the Word of the Shabad - what Praises of the Lord will you stubborn-mindedly sing?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਮੂੜਾ ਅਵਰਾ ਆਖਿ ਦੁਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa aap na pachhaanai moorraa avaraa aakh dukhaae |
lines.english: The fool does not understand his own self; he annoys others with his speech.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਢੈ ਦੀ ਖਸਲਤਿ ਨ ਗਈਆ ਅੰਧੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mundtai dee khasalat na geea andhe vichhurr chottaa khaae |
lines.english: His underlying nature does not leave him; separated from the Lord, he suffers cruel blows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭੈ ਭੰਨਿ ਨ ਘੜਿਓ ਰਹੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhai bhan na gharrio rahai ank samaae |
lines.english: Through the fear of the True Guru, he has not changed and reformed himself, so that he might merge in the lap of God.
